editorial_principle: Each field does not describe a fairy tale but reconfigures its legibility as a system in which failure, language, time and metamorphosis are structural operators rather than plot events. The jellyfish does not succeed but becomes: the system's goal is never what it declares.

fields.label: campo_della_missione_impossibile
fields.basho: the mission is structurally impossible from the beginning: the jellyfish does not know where to find a monkey, the liver is never present, the objective is unreachable by design
fields.kokyu: the rhythm is that of iteration: the same structure repeats (swim → ask → receive partial answer → continue) without approaching the goal linearly
fields.activation_condition: awareness that the declared goal is unreachable and that the real result will be different
fields.persistence_rule: field persists through the entire journey as structural impossibility
fields.dissolution_rule: field dissolves only when the real result (metamorphosis) replaces the declared goal
fields.textual_anchor_it: Solo che, la povera Medusa non aveva la minima idea di dove trovare una scimmia.

fields.label: campo_del_lapsus
fields.basho: the verbal slip has no spatial location: it occurs in the middle of a conversation and changes everything retroactively
fields.kokyu: the rhythm is that of the accident: normal flow interrupted by a single word that cannot be taken back
fields.activation_condition: the moment fegato/fiato produces its double meaning and the secret is revealed
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as permanent consequence: once said, cannot be unsaid
fields.dissolution_rule: non-dissolvable; the slip is the point of no return

affects.field-01: the slip collapses the mission field permanently
affects.field-03: the slip produces the metamorphosis field as indirect consequence

fields.textual_anchor_it: O magari senza fegato... si lasciò sfuggire la Medusa.

fields.label: campo_della_metamorfosi_involontaria
fields.basho: the metamorphosis is not located in a dramatic space: it happens in the mundane space of the court, during collective anger
fields.kokyu: the rhythm is that of violence that becomes art: rapid destruction → permanent new form → unexpected beauty
fields.activation_condition: punishment by the court + loss of bones + survival + discovery of superior movement
fields.persistence_rule: permanent: the jellyfish without bones is the definitive state
fields.dissolution_rule: non-dissolvable: the transformation is the system's final state
fields.textual_anchor_it: dovreste vederla ora come nuota flessuosa tra le onde, bellissima e veloce, perfino più di prima.

fields.label: campo_temporale_doppio
fields.basho: the illustrations exist in two simultaneous times: Japan 1980s and Italy 2024; the analogue photography maintains both fields active without choosing between them
fields.kokyu: the rhythm is that of recovery: thirty years of silence then sudden publication; the wait amplifies the field
fields.activation_condition: viewing the illustrations with awareness of their double temporal origin
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as the analogue technique remains visible in the image
fields.dissolution_rule: field collapses if digital processing erases the analogue texture
fields.textual_anchor_it: L'anno in cui impostare il punto di arrivo della specialissima macchina è il 1993.

fields.label: campo_dell_esito_inatteso
fields.basho: ogni azione del sistema genera un risultato diverso da quello previsto
fields.kokyu: il ritmo è quello della deviazione continua: intenzione → errore → conseguenza → forma superiore
fields.activation_condition: presenza di uno scarto tra obiettivo dichiarato e risultato effettivo
fields.persistence_rule: il campo rimane attivo per l'intera narrazione
fields.dissolution_rule: non dissolvibile: il sistema esiste grazie alla deviazione

affects.field-01: rivela che la missione era solo un pretesto
affects.field-02: trasforma il lapsus in operatore narrativo
affects.field-04: trasforma il ritardo editoriale in valore aggiunto

fields.textual_anchor_it: dovreste vederla ora come nuota flessuosa tra le onde, bellissima e veloce, perfino più di prima.

system_note.system_behavior: fields operate as inversion operators: every declared negative (failure, slip, punishment) produces an undeclared positive (wisdom, truth, beauty)
system_note.key_insight: field-05 is the meta-field that explains all others: the system produces superior outcomes through failure, not despite it
